message:
test(engine): use deterministic signing key in privacy learning contract tests

Replace SigningKey::generate() with SigningKey::from_bytes([42u8; 32])
in the test helper. Random key generation made test failures
non-reproducible — using a fixed seed ensures deterministic behavior
for debugging and CI consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
